**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Wenzhou Mojia Machinery Co., Ltd. is an active, micro-scale legacy manufacturing workshop deeply embedded in the 'Wenzhou Model' industrial cluster. Despite suffering from severe raw data corruption, forensic extraction of its historical name ('Wenzhou Jinbao Motorcycle Parts Manufacturing') from the 'industry_medium' field reveals its true origins. Established in 1988 in Ruian City (the capital of China's auto/motorcycle parts aftermarket), its actual scope, recovered from 'other_email', spans 'auto parts, motorcycle parts, standard fasteners, electrical switches, and plumbing fixtures'. This vast array of low-end hardware confirms it operates as a flexible, multi-purpose metal processing workshop. With a corrected workforce of 18 insured employees (2024), it is a classic Tier-3/Tier-4 hardware subcontractor serving the massive Ruian automotive and plumbing aftermarket ecosystems.
